prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia stands before two doors: one heavy door labeled "拼尽全力" that did not open, and one lighter door labeled "机会" that is opening with sunlight. She holds a small key labeled "抓住".

Core meaning: hard work and fate do not always align, but when opportunity appears, you must seize it.

Style: clean reflective Chinese blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, warm light from the opening door. Minimal labels: "命运", "机会", "抓住".

Avoid fatalistic darkness, avoid motivational poster style, avoid giant text.
